catalog_content:
Item Name: YAMASAN KYOTO UJI Japanese Ceremonial Grade Matcha BI, Matcha Green Tea Powder, 100％ Authentic Japanese Origin, From Uji Kyoto, Japan (30g)
Bullet Point 1: ✅ CEREMONIAL GRADE MATCHA - We carefully select the finest quality matcha green tea from Uji, Kyoto, Japan. We have collaborated with local tea masters and have a delightful tea plantation in the heart of Uji. The tea master carefully chose and blend two varieties of the finest tea leaves, Saemidori and Okumidori, as these tea leave have brilliant vivid green color and an elegant sweetness, resulting in a delicious, Ceremonial Grade Matcha
Bullet Point 2: ✅ORGANIC GREEN TEA - 100% JONA & JAS organic certified. We carefully select the finest quality organic green tea from Uji, Kyoto, Japan. We have collaborated with local tea masters and we have a delightful tea plantation that has been protected by the tea farmers for over 350 years since the Genroku era. Our plantation is also located in the heart of Uji, an area renounded for its ideal climate and conditions to produce the best leaves for matcha production
Bullet Point 3: ✅ FRESHNESS - The tea leaves of Matcha "Bi" are slowly aged for one year before being ground into powder. This makes the taste and scent more mellow and increases the sweetness. You can also enjoy the freshness of the picked tea leaves, as the conditions of which they are aged are carefully monitored and are under constant vacuum sealed conditions
Bullet Point 4: ✅ A SUPERFOOD FOR ABUNDANT AND HEALTHY LIFESTYLE - This matcha green tea is called “BI” which means beautiful in Japanese. It is important for us to maintain a good balance for both mental and physical health. Having a blissful moment with matcha everyday can help you feel calm, and provide essential nutritious components for our body
Bullet Point 5: ✅ ENJOY MATCHA IN YOUR OWN STYLE IN ANY COUNTRIES - Matcha is easy to make! You can create your own matcha beverages at home such as matcha latte, matcha frappuccino, matcha lemonade, etc. You can even use this premium grade matcha to make various recipes for sweets or pastries like matcha pancake, matcha pound cake, matcha cheesecake, etc. It definitely can be used to create special moments in which you can enjoy our matcha in your daily life
Bullet Point 6: ✅ VEGAN, GLUTEN FREE - Matcha contains abundant nutritious components that drive biological activity of our body,. The finest healthy beverage choice for those who are concerned about healthy lifestyle or food habits
Product Description: CEREMONIAL GRADE MATCHA - We carefully select the finest quality matcha green tea from Uji, Kyoto, Japan. We have collaborated with local tea masters and we have a delightful tea plantation that has been protected by the tea farmers for over 350 years since the Genroku era. The tea master carefully chose and blended two varieties of finest tea leaves, Saemidori and Okumidori as it has a brilliant green color and elegant sweetness.
Value: 1.0582
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium ceremonial grade matcha from Uji, Kyoto, Japan, with JONA & JAS organic certifications. High-quality packaging and organic, vegan, and gluten-free claims indicate a premium positioning. Small 30g size suggests a higher price per unit, targeting health-conscious consumers and matcha enthusiasts.
